old.desc:
## **Mythical 🌟**

**Elegant**
Reduce Stand cooldowns by 10%. Attacking a victim grants a short burst of speed. Damage slightly scales with movement speed.

**Feral**
\+10% Damage, −10% Defense.

**Demonic**

Lifesteal is 50% more effective.

**Transcendent**
\+7% Damage, +7% Power Regeneration, +7% Global Defense.

---

---

## **Legendary 🟨**

**Methodical**
Perfect Blocking restores 20% Power and grants a small speed boost.

**Dominant**
Deal 25% more damage to opponents that haven’t hit you.

**Cursed**
\+4% Damage, +4% Power Regeneration, +4% Global Defense.

**Rhythmic**
\+35% Power Regeneration.

**Artistic**
Block Breaking an opponent makes them Vulnerable for 5 seconds.
(Vulnerable targets take 20% more damage.)

**Suffocating**
Damage-over-time effects are 50% more potent.

---

---

## **Rare 🟦**

**Determined**
While above 70% Health, deal 4% more damage.

**Compassionate**
Healing output is 25% more effective.

**Furious**
Below 30% Health, deal 10% more damage.

**Slugger**
Block Breaking skills deal 10% more damage.

**Fearful**
Being Block Broken grants 20% Defense for 2 seconds.

**Durable**
Status effect damage is 100% less potent.

---

---

## **Uncommon 🟩**

**Curious**
Gain 20% more Evasive gain.

**Astute**
Blocked attacks deal 10% more chip damage.

**Predictive**
Counter skills deal 10% more damage.

**Kind**
Healing output is 10% more effective.

---

---

## **Common ⬜**

**Erratic**
Dodging an attack restores 5% Power.

**Energetic**
Gain 10% more Power Regeneration.

**Cowardly**
Reduces the effectiveness of slow effects while low on Health.

**Happy**
Increase Health Regeneration by 5%.

**Firm**
Blocking attacks grants Power.

**Arrogant**
At maximum Health, gain 5% more damage.

old.desc:
## **Pucci** is one of the main NPC’s in game that currently can offer Evolutions for stands. He is found in [Dio’s Chapel](https://trello.com/c/gSGKpZw5/568-graveyard "‌"), and he offers information about the [“Journey to Heaven”](https://trello.com/c/eZdniYOH/25-untitled "‌").

---

---

**WHERE CAN THIS NPC BE FOUND:**

Pucci can be found at **BUS STOP 18**. From the stop, go straight forward, and you should run into a hole in the hill. Then, as you go into it and turn left, you should find Pucci in a room.

![image.webp](https://trello.com/1/cards/69763cddbf284a162ab4854e/attachments/69a07415952cfb7de0422ba5/previews/69a07415952cfb7de0422bbe/download/image.webp)

## [Money Store](https://trello.com/c/U5Bx5pOP/265-rahaj-shop-npc "‌")

**The Fever**
Defeating a player steals 10% of their stats for 20 seconds. (10s Cooldown)

**Hustle Bones**
All money gained is increased by +5%.

**Curve and Light**
Reduce Stand Awakening cooldown by 10%.

**I'm in Your Area**
Enemies at close range deal 8% less damage and take 8% more damage from you.

---

---

## [Tutorial](https://trello.com/c/z0bfNfpT/228-untitled "‌")

**Journeyman**

\+5% experience boost.

---

---

## [Prestige Shop](https://trello.com/c/DyPXYXUF/26-untitled "‌")

**Bloodlust**

After being hit, your HP rapidly drains to 5%. While active gain +100% penetration, +50% damage, and lifesteal.

---

---

## Side Quest

**The Heirophant**

Take -15% Physical damage but (take) +15% Slash damage

**Retribution**

Backstab attacks apply the status effect Bleed and lifesteal.

[**The Magician**](https://trello.com/c/92v0vFM6/316-shozuki "‌")

Evading and then landing an attack makes the attack deal knockback and 100% more damage.

**The Fool**

Being ragdolled grants you more evasive bar.

**The High Priestess**

Posing grants more healing and power regeneration.

**Gardener**

All healing sources are now done over 10 seconds. Heal 10% more overall.

**Internal Conjuration**

While your stand is not summoned, gain 10% Damage and Defense.

---

---

## [**Gang Wars**](https://trello.com/c/yREtz6QY/162-untitled "‌")

**Commanding Presence**
Other gang members gain 5% damage and defense, stacking up to 30% globally.

---

---

## [**Gang Territories**](https://trello.com/c/yREtz6QY/162-untitled "‌")

**The Boss**
Each additional gang member in the server increases money gain by 4%, up to 28%.

**Protection Racket**
While in a gang-controlled area, incoming damage is reduced by 20%.

**Loyal Enforcer**
Gang contracts grant 25% more experience and money.

---

---

## [**Jotaro Kujo Raid**](https://trello.com/c/1SgWTc2k/163-untitled "‌")

**True Warrior**

All healing is 50% less effective. Gain 10% Defense. Being ragdolled grants you 15% defense for 10 seconds.

**Grappler**
Grab moves deal 15% more damage.

**Intimidation**
After grabbing an opponent, they take 10% increased damage for 7 seconds.

**Powerful**
Attacks cannot deal more than 10% of your Max Health. When an attack reaches that threshold, takes away Power and reduce your evasive bar. Takes more if the damage is significant.

---

---

## [**Avdol Raid**](https://trello.com/c/1SgWTc2k/163-untitled "‌")

**King of Flames**
Stand abilities apply Burn.

**Conjurer**
Doubles Stand Conjuration gained.

**Disaster Flames**

Knocking an enemy back that’s on Fire ignites their flames, causing an explosion. This will ignite both of you on fire.

**Flame Keeper**

The Flame Status effect now heals you instead. Health regeneration is reduced by 50%.

**The Magician**

Evading and then landing an attack makes the attack deal knockback and 100% more damage.

---

---

## [**DIO Raid**](https://trello.com/c/1SgWTc2k/163-untitled "‌")

**Emperor of Time**
Time-altering abilities last 2 seconds longer.

**Leech**

Lifesteal is 50% more potent, but costs a small amount of power when performed.

**The Godfather**
Stand abilities apply lifesteal. (5s Cooldown)

**Retribution**

Backstab attacks apply the status effect Bleed and lifesteal.

---

---

## [**Yoshikage Kira Raid**](https://trello.com/c/1SgWTc2k/163-untitled "‌")

**A Quiet Life**
After taking damage, regenerate 5% health over 5 seconds. (30s Cooldown)

**Serial Killer**
Deal 20% more damage to enemies below 40% health.

**Siphon**

You are unable to regenerate any Power at all. Steal your opponents Power when landing an attack.

---

---

## [**Made in Heaven**](https://trello.com/c/6rRmjebY/49-made-in-heaven "‌")

**Rapid Flow**
Starting to sprint grants a short speed boost. (5s Cooldown)

**Accelerated Instinct**
Doubles dodge frames.

**Inevitability**
Gain 5% penetration. Penetration increases with speed boosts.

---

---

## [**C-Moon**](https://trello.com/c/1hP1aTRw/3-c-moon "‌")

**Gravitational Force**
Blocking an attacker slows them for 3 seconds. (5s Cooldown)

**Martial Artist**
Martial Art attacks deal 10% more damage.

**No Escape**
Blockbreaking an opponent prevents evasion for 3 seconds. (10s Cooldown)

---

---

## [**Whitesnake**](https://trello.com/c/RX5RLePe/7-whitesnake "‌")

**Null Memory**
The first attack from an opponent deals 25% less damage.

**Synthetic Focus**
At full power, gain 20% defense.

**Autocrat**
After recovering from ragdoll, gain 50% defense for 1.25 seconds.

---

---

---

## [**Star Platinum**](https://trello.com/c/Y165n3Pf/1-star-platinum "‌")

**Unyielding Force**
Landing 3 hits quickly grants 5% damage for 6 seconds. (20s Cooldown)

**Fists of Fury**
Blockbreaking an opponent ragdolls them. (10s Cooldown)

**Absolute Destruction**
Knocking an opponent into a wall blockbreaks them. (15s Cooldown)

---

---

## [**The World**](https://trello.com/c/aLERlC1V/9-the-world "‌")

**King of Time**
Damage dealt during timestop is 10% more effective.

**Theatrical**
Projectiles deal 10% more damage.

**Play with Your Food**
For each percent of health above 80%, gain 1% damage.
Below 80%, lose 1% damage per percent, capped at a 10% debuff.

---

---

## [**The World: High Voltage**](https://trello.com/c/ziEpixgd/179-the-world-high-voltage "‌")

**Shockflow**
Gain 1% damage per 10% missing power.

**Static Override**
Below 25% power, gain a movement speed boost for 7 seconds. (15s Cooldown)

**Shock Conduit**
After a perfect block, breaking guard within 6 seconds grants 300% power regen for 7 seconds. (20s Cooldown)

---

---

## [**King Crimson**](https://trello.com/c/AgJjkUEh/33-king-crimson "‌")

**Hidden Impact**
Dodging and then blocking an attack within 3 seconds grants +15% defense for 10 seconds.

**Forecasted Pain**
Enemies under 50% health have their Blockbroken hitstun increased by 25%

**Two Steps Ahead**
Dodging then blocking within 3 seconds grants 15% defense for 10 seconds. (20s Cooldown)

---

---

## [**Gold Experience**](https://trello.com/c/F0qns8wY/24-golden-experience "‌")

**Nature’s Armor**
Gaining a status effect grants +25% defense for 10 seconds. (22s Cooldown)

**Vital Instinct**
Below 30% health, landing attacks grants +5% power.

**Life Pulse**
Outgoing and self healing remove status effects.

---

---

## [**Stone Free**](https://trello.com/c/8g997swa/176-stone-free "‌")

**Line Tension**
Every third attack that isn’t a basic attack deals bonus true damage based on percentage of target’s current health (4%). (15s Cooldown)

**Resourceful**
Deal +5% more global damage.

**Resilient**
Deal +5% more damage to opponents with +5% more max health than you.

---

---

## [**Weather Report**](https://trello.com/c/twwwjxwD/184-weather-report "‌")

**Elementalist**
Attacks involving the weather deal +10% more damage.

**Thunderous**
Attacks involving lightning deal +10% more damage.

**Oppression**
Attacks involving knockback deal +10% more damage.

---

---

## [**Killer Queen**](https://trello.com/c/Fk75BSAj/30-killer-queen "‌")

**Detonate**
Blockbreaking an opponent applies the flame status effect to them. (20s Cooldown)

**Heart Attack**
Your damage is now done over the span of 3 seconds. Deal -15% less damage, but gain 45% penetration and uncap penetration.

**No Witnesses**
Defeating an enemy grants +15% damage for 10 seconds.

---

---

## [**Magician’s Red**](https://trello.com/c/3VitTVk6/52-magicians-red "‌")

**Ignition Boost**
Burning opponents take +10% more damage from you and deal -20% less damage to you.

**Scorchstep**
Dodging an opponents attack puts the flame status effect on both of you. (7s Cooldown)

**Kindled Resolve**
If you are on fire while an opponent attacks you, ignite your opponent on fire as well.

---

---

## [**Crazy Diamond**](https://trello.com/c/pRdBh7xE/17-crazy-diamond "‌")

**Healing Blow**
The next outgoing healing ability heals +40% more. (15s Cooldown)

**Good Friend**
Outgoing healing is +10% more effective.

**Brute Force**
Barrages deal +20% more damage.

---

---

## [**Purple Haze**](https://trello.com/c/ZaQWAG7F/6-purple-haze "‌")

**Corrupted Instinct**
Enemies with less health than you take 5% more damage.

**Frenzied State**
Gain +20% damage and receive 40% damage.

**Unpredictable**
Sometimes your attacks seem to reflect onto yourself. When they do, gain +25% damage, +25% penetration, and lifesteal for 10 seconds. (11s Cooldown)

---

---

## [**Red Hot Chili Peppers**](https://trello.com/c/2sUugOsm/520-red-hot-chili-pepper "‌")

**Charge Conduction**
Holding block grants 50% power regeneration.

**Amped Up**
At max power, attacks deal 5% more damage.

**Blackout**
Blockbreaking drains 10% of the enemy’s power bar.

---

## [**The Hand**](https://trello.com/c/Y9EjrcQ4/622-the-hand "‌")

**Erasure**
Enemies under 5% health are automatically executed. (Excludes special NPCs)

**Impatient**
Power regeneration increases by 50% under 50% HP.

**Reckless**
Being blockbroken gives your next attack +25% more damage.

---

---

## [**Anubis**](https://trello.com/c/ROfYsPvE/4-anubis "‌")

**Sheathe**
Counter attacks deal 10% more damage.

**The Blade**
Slash damage is increased by +10%.

**Flow State**
When going below 50% health, heal 10% HP and power instantly. (180s Cooldown)

## [Money Store](https://trello.com/c/U5Bx5pOP/265-rahaj-shop-npc "‌")

**The Fever**
Defeating a player steals 10% of their stats for 20 seconds. (10s Cooldown)

**Hustle Bones**
All money gained is increased by 5%.

**Curve and Light**
Reduce Stand Awakening cooldown by 10%.

**I'm in Your Area**
Enemies at close range deal 8% less damage and take 8% more damage from you.

---

---

## Tutorial

**Journeyman**

\+5% experience boost.

---

---

## [**Gang Wars**](https://trello.com/c/yREtz6QY/162-untitled "‌")

**Commanding Presence**
Other gang members gain 5% damage and defense, stacking up to 30% globally.

---

---

## [**Gang Territories**](https://trello.com/c/yREtz6QY/162-untitled "‌")

**The Boss**
Each additional gang member in the server increases money gain by 4%, up to 28%.

**Protection Racket**
While in a gang-controlled area, incoming damage is reduced by 20%.

**Loyal Enforcer**
Gang contracts grant 25% more experience and money.

---

---

## [**Jotaro Kujo Raid**](https://trello.com/c/1SgWTc2k/163-untitled "‌")

**True Warrior**

All healing is 50% less effective. Gain 10% Defense. Being ragdolled grants you 15% defense for 10 seconds.

**Grappler**
Grab moves deal 15% more damage.

**Intimidation**
After grabbing an opponent, they take 10% increased damage for 7 seconds.

**Powerful**
Attacks cannot deal more than 10% of your Max Health. When an attack reaches that threshold, takes away Power and reduce your evasive bar. Takes more if the damage is significant.

---

---

## [**Avdol Raid**](https://trello.com/c/1SgWTc2k/163-untitled "‌")

**King of Flames**
Stand abilities apply Burn.

**Conjurer**
Doubles Stand Conjuration gained.

**Disaster Flames**

Knocking an enemy back that’s on Fire ignites their flames, causing an explosion. This will ignite both of you on fire.

**Flame Keeper**

The Flame Status effect now heals you instead. Health regeneration is reduced by 50%.

**The Magician**

Evading and then landing an attack makes the attack deal knockback and 100% more damage.

---

---

## [**DIO Raid**](https://trello.com/c/1SgWTc2k/163-untitled "‌")

**Emperor of Time**
Time-altering abilities last 2 seconds longer.

**Leech**

Lifesteal is 50% more potent, but costs a small amount of power when performed.

**The Godfather**
Stand abilities apply lifesteal. (5s Cooldown)

**Retribution**

Backstab attacks apply the status effect Bleed and lifesteal.

---

---

## [**Yoshikage Kira Raid**](https://trello.com/c/1SgWTc2k/163-untitled "‌")

**A Quiet Life**
After taking damage, regenerate 5% health over 5 seconds. (30s Cooldown)

**Serial Killer**
Deal 20% more damage to enemies below 40% health.

**Siphon**

You are unable to regenerate any Power at all. Steal your opponents Power when landing an attack.

---

---

## [**Made in Heaven**](https://trello.com/c/6rRmjebY/49-made-in-heaven "‌")

**Rapid Flow**
Starting to sprint grants a short speed boost. (5s Cooldown)

**Accelerated Instinct**
Doubles dodge frames.

**Inevitability**
Gain 5% penetration. Penetration increases with speed boosts.

---

---

## [**C-Moon**](https://trello.com/c/1hP1aTRw/3-c-moon "‌")

Crazy Diamond Slams the ground with all of his immense strength and hurts the opponent, and the rocks from the ground that crazy diamond has smashed, it restores them to the opponent's body, making them not able to move for a certain amount of time.

# The Tutorial is the first quest in the Storyline that teaches you the basics of the game.

![image-ezgif.com-resize\_\(9\).png](https://trello.com/1/cards/697122804b6c69371b7acd5e/attachments/6976154027b49ee4a70b7aa2/download/image-ezgif.com-resize_(9).png)

---

---

## **To access the Tutorial you have to go to the  **[**Morioh Grand Hotel**](https://trello.com/c/ytTepwFh/571-hotel-tutorial-area "‌") and talk to the Receptionist.

![receptionist.png](https://trello.com/1/cards/697122804b6c69371b7acd5e/attachments/6976161802f4c41fa3b14f8a/download/receptionist.png)

## To unlock your first stand you have to use a [Stand Arrow](https://trello.com/c/Z82ovOVJ/41-stand-arrow "‌") on yourself.

![MedalTVRoblox20260125151317561-1769346817\_\(1\).gif](https://trello.com/1/cards/69531c65886205bca157f448/attachments/69761acb33e5a3bf34c86543/download/MedalTVRoblox20260125151317561-1769346817_(1).gif)

## A **Stand** is a visual manifestation of life energy; in other words, the manifestation of the soul of the user. To conjure and unlock its abilities, you have to use that specific stand while:

- Doing any Mission.
- Killing NPCs / Players.
- Winning any Ranked Gamemode.
- Winning PVP Missions.

### The best way to farm conjuration for your stand is the [mat in the gym.](https://trello.com/c/irIwXL9l/570-gym "‌")

![5c8f3a02-922c-4c46-8339-89b55a12ec66-render-ezgif.com-optimize.gif](https://trello.com/1/cards/69531c778c98bcb083a8703b/attachments/6976368b8d5623106af4fc16/download/5c8f3a02-922c-4c46-8339-89b55a12ec66-render-ezgif.com-optimize.gif)

## The Mission Boards are the most important thing in the early game as they offer easy progression through simple quests

![image-ezgif.com-resize\_\(12\).png](https://trello.com/1/cards/69727aa2cf093b4ffa3740ed/attachments/6976250e0ba66230801b48c8/download/image-ezgif.com-resize_(12).png)

## The Pve Board gives the following quests:

- Deliver the Briefcase to X
- Deliver the Letter to X
- Deliver the Briefcase to X
- Deliver the Necklace to X
- Exterminate Targets

## The PVP Board gives the following quests:

## To obtain a Sub-Ability, you can either talk to any of the available trainers around the map ([Ripple](https://trello.com/c/zFun2FIf/40-untitled "‌"), [Cyborg](https://trello.com/c/fUyCZZ2C/164-untitled "‌"), [Spin](https://trello.com/c/hSVDi4dE/209-untitled "‌")) or use a specific item like [Vampire](https://trello.com/c/mohrgfOp/5-untitled "‌").

## To unlock a Fighting Style, you have to talk to any of the trainers located around the map ( [Kendo](https://trello.com/c/VRGpEuC5/35-untitled "‌"), [Boxing](https://trello.com/c/pLVD2Il4/37-untitled "‌"), [Karate ](https://trello.com/c/PvQwhiSZ/38-untitled "‌")) that will teach you their Fighting Styles and unlock abilities.

![Screenshot2026-01-25170437-ezgif.com-resize.jpg](https://trello.com/1/cards/69531c612fbbcef6ddae5477/attachments/6976317b4e9db678d4a643a5/download/Screenshot2026-01-25170437-ezgif.com-resize.jpg)

## Prestiging is one of the End Game mechanics we currently have in the game. To prestige, you need 10,000 Cash and talk to [**Arch Mage**](https://trello.com/c/DZRrTlGK/614-arch-mage "‌") in the [Hospital](https://trello.com/c/t7UhDl47/569-hospital "‌"), the nearest bus stop being the 10th one.

- This will give you 5 Prestige Shards that you can spend in the Prestige shop.
- This will also offer you one Stand storage and you can have up to 4 free Storages.

[https://youtu.be/FxLjbtsQk8M](https://youtu.be/FxLjbtsQk8M "smartCard-embed")

‌

## He will also give you the option to check out the “Prestige Shop” where you can buy specific End Game items that will help you throught your journey.

![image.png](https://trello.com/1/cards/6953030500874d0dc5346233/attachments/69763a5a4a59512ad31563f6/download/image.png)

## World Events are limited-time, server-wide activities that offer unique gameplay and rewards. Two notable examples include [20 MIN CD] :

---

---

- **Graveyard Uprising**: A survival mode where players fight waves of NPCs without dying, all within a strict time limit.

![Screenshot\_2026-01-24\_174522.png](https://trello.com/1/cards/695324e17a28736d41f41e9e/attachments/6974e983942a3985d4ec2391/download/Screenshot_2026-01-24_174522.png)

- **Deathmatch**: A team-based PvP mode where two squads face off, each player starting with only 2 lives. The goal is to eliminate the opposing team.

![image-ezgif.com-resize\_\(5\).png](https://trello.com/1/cards/695324e17a28736d41f41e9e/attachments/69756d4799018255332f5694/download/image-ezgif.com-resize_(5).png)

## **"Gangs"** or the so-called Clans, work as in any game that has this feature, **it allows players to be in a group together sharing a Gang name, and unlocks various features such as:**

![image.png](https://trello.com/1/cards/695324f8f85d86fe982b3b45/attachments/697570716a3f1b9aeefac045/download/image.png)

- Gang Wars.
- Gang Territories.
- Gang Shop [ For specific Perks / Items ].

---

---

## _**GANG FAME/RANK**_ is something that works like an overall ELO for your gang. This is calculated by the overworld kills. That means that every kill in the overworld, WHILE being in a gang, will get you 5 fame.

---

---

## **Gang Territories** are claimable zones on the map that gangs can control to earn rewards such as **passive income items/perks.**

![image.png](https://trello.com/1/cards/695324eb2727e5a96a999d65/attachments/69554d9b53429e32e1f66119/download/image.png)

---

---

## The **Gang Contractor** is the most **important** NPC for Gangs, as you can take **“Gang Contracts”** from him that will give you 3-5 **“Gang Points” and/or Common/Rare Chests**, you are also able to buy stuff from his Shop.

![image.png](https://trello.com/1/cards/695324f8f85d86fe982b3b45/attachments/69757238965add1781ab10d0/download/image.png)

![image.webp](https://trello.com/1/cards/695324f8f85d86fe982b3b45/attachments/698643acdcff19262858b549/previews/698643addcff19262858b592/download/image.webp)

## The “Gang Shop” Sells the various items:

- Stand Conjuration Essence
- Stand Stat Essence
- Stand Personality Essence
- Lucky Arrow
- Legendary Chest
- DIO’s Bone
- DIO’s Diary
- Hammer
- Rare Chest

## To enter your Inner World you have to inteact with the mat in the gym that will allow you to enter. This is one of the quickest ways to obtain conjuration on a stand

![image.png](https://trello.com/1/cards/69769cb242054f5b0dcefe7e/attachments/6976a00896683c799cb0972f/download/image.png)

---

The Inner World clone of you says the following words

“Do you wish to push your limits?”

The following things you can say:

1. “Yes”
2. “I want to surpass my limits.”
3. “No, take me back.”
4. “Nevermind.”

---

---

**“Yes.”-** Would put every power and your stand power too into the clone of you, and you will fight yourself. When winning against yourself, you uncap your powers and gain a point of power (THE STAT POINT). If you lose, you'd have to do it again.

---

---

**“I want to surpass my limits.”-** This means you will fight yourself with the awakening of your stand, giving yourself more of a challenge, and giving more rewards. **( UNLOCKS AWAKENING )**

**(Requirement: LEVEL 50, STAND CONJURATION 100)**

---

---

**“No, take me back.”-** This will take you back to the real world.

---

---

**“Nevermind.”-** This makes you stop talking to yourself

## Stats are a way to make a difference in combat; adding points increases your Stand's Destructive Power or Destructive Energy, giving a way to outscale your opponent.

---

---

### **Strength -**

Increases your Physical-Based attacks **[EXAMPLE: Any RED damage that is NOT a STAND)**

---

---

### **Health -**

Increases your character's maximum health **[EXAMPLE: BASE HP + X HP]**

---

---

### **Power -**

Increases your Sub-Ability Damage and maximum Power. **[EXAMPLE: SUB-ABILITY MOVES]**

---

---

### **Weapon -**

Increases your Slash Damage and Weapon Damage **[EXAMPLE:** [**Stop Sign**](https://trello.com/c/jpyDrDKd/604-stop-sign "‌"), [Shadow Axe](https://trello.com/c/ekjyJbFM/605-shadow-axe "‌"), [Odachi](https://trello.com/c/XTHrj7p4/607-odachi "‌"), [Anubis](https://trello.com/c/ROfYsPvE/4-anubis "‌")**]**

---

---

### **Destructive Power -**

Increases your Stands Physical based attacks **[EXAMPLE: STAND RED DAMAGE (HIT MARKERS)** **]**

---

---

### **Destructive Energy -**

Increases your Stands Special Ability Damage **[EXAMPLE: STAND BLUE DAMAGE (HIT MARKERS) ]**

cards.desc:
##  ALL Accessories roll 2 or more random bonus stats.
 **And Stats are multiplied by the Rarity tier. Mythical 3x, Legendary 2.5x, Rare 2x, Uncommon 1.5x, Common 1x.**

---

### **Base stats for every type of accessory:**

Head accessories = Health + Health Regeneration

Face accessories = Power + Power Regeneration

Neck accessories = Health + Penetration

Back accessories = Health + Power Regeneration

Body accessories = Health + Defense

Arms accessories = Penetration + Health Regeneration

Legs accessories = Health + Power

### **Bonus stats can be:**

Health
Defense
Penetration
Power
PvE Damage
Power Regeneration
Health Regeneration

---

**EXAMPLE:**

Jotaro’s Hat [Legendary] =
1 RNG stat HP
1 RNG stat Penetration

health = 4 * 3
hp regen = 2 * 3
power = 1 * 3
defense = 1 * 3

- **You CAN get the same RNG stat twice**
- **So you can get +6 hp instead of +3**
cards.name: !! How accessories stats work !!
